title: Why ONNX Inference Outperforms PyTorch in Production
subtitle: Achieving drastic speedups without additional optimization
description: Transitioning from PyTorch (.pth) to ONNX for model inference can yield drastic speed improvements during product building, even before applying complex optimizations like quantization.
excerpt: When building AI products, inference speed is critical. Switching from PyTorch's native format to ONNX can lead to drastic performance gains out of the box.
hero_caption: A conceptual comparison of execution graphs.
hero_aria: Abstract visualization of ONNX graph vs PyTorch execution
hero_image_note: A diagram comparing PyTorch dynamic graph and ONNX static graph execution.
